code:
type Tree =
  | Leaf
  | Node(left: Tree, right: Tree)

fn depth(_ tree: Tree) -> Int
  match tree
  when Leaf
    0
  when Node(left: l, right: r)
    let ld = depth(l)
    let rd = depth(r)
    if ld > rd
      1 + ld
    else
      1 + rd
    end
  end
end

let tree = Tree.Node(
  left: Tree.Node(
    left: Tree.Leaf,
    right: Tree.Node(left: Tree.Leaf, right: Tree.Leaf)
  ),
  right: Tree.Leaf
)

let d = depth(tree)
print("depth=#{d}")
